## Problem

What user, client, or operations problem are we trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or workflow change you want.

## Why It Matters

What value would this create for public visitors, internal staff, or clients?

## Notes

Include examples, mockups, screenshots, or related issues.
